narrative:
Mifflin Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 649 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.1 percentage points.
